## What & why
Briefly describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issue
(e.g. `Closes #12`).

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Data series / pipeline
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## How it was verified
Describe how you tested this — ideally exercised end-to-end against a live
Oracle, not just typecheck. Include commands / screenshots where useful.

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes (strict, no `any`)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Updated `shared/types` if the API changed
- [ ] Updated docs (`docs/API.md`, `ARCHITECTURE.md`) if relevant
- [ ] Verified the change actually runs
